config.name: CLOCK_DYNAMIC
config.description: Enables dynamic clock handling.

config.name: PWR_VOSR
config.description: Selects the core voltage scaling range.

config.name: LSI_PREDIV
config.description: Selects the LSI oscillator output divider.

config.name: AUDIOCLK
config.description: Selects the external audio clock frequency.

config.name: MSIS_RANGE
config.values: RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE0_48M RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE1_24M RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE2_16M RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE3_12M RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE4_4M RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE5_2M RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE6_1333K RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE7_1M RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE8_3072K RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE9_1536K RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE10_1024K RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE11_768K RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE12_400K RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE13_200K RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE14_133K RCC_ICSCR1_MSISRANGE_RANGE15_100K
config.description: Selects the MSIS frequency range.

config.name: MSIK_RANGE
config.values: RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE0_48M RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE1_24M RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE2_16M RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE3_12M RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE4_4M RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE5_2M RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE6_1333K RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE7_1M RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE8_3072K RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE9_1536K RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE10_1024K RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE11_768K RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE12_400K RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE13_200K RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE14_133K RCC_ICSCR1_MSIKRANGE_RANGE15_100K
config.description: Selects the MSIK frequency range.

config.name: MSIBIAS
config.description: Selects the MSI bias mode.

config.name: TIMICSEL
config.description: Selects the timer internal capture clock sources.

config.name: STOPWUCK
config.description: Selects the system clock source after Stop mode.

config.name: STOPKERWUCK
config.description: Selects the kernel clock source after Stop mode.

config.name: PLL1P_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the PLL1 P output clock.

config.name: PLL1Q_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the PLL1 Q output clock.

config.name: PLL1R_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the PLL1 R output clock.

config.name: PLL2P_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the PLL2 P output clock.

config.name: PLL2Q_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the PLL2 Q output clock.

config.name: PLL2R_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the PLL2 R output clock.

config.name: PLL3P_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the PLL3 P output clock.

config.name: PLL3Q_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the PLL3 Q output clock.

config.name: PLL3R_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the PLL3 R output clock.

config.name: MDF1_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the MDF1 clock.

config.name: ADF1_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the ADF1 clock.

config.name: DAC1SH_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the DAC1 sample-and-hold clock.

config.name: LPTIM1_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the LPTIM1 clock.

config.name: LPTIM2_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the LPTIM2 clock.

config.name: LPTIM34_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the LPTIM3 and LPTIM4 clocks.

source.description: 48 MHz secure high speed internal oscillator

sink.name: PLL1P_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the PLL1 P output clock when enabled.

sink.name: PLL1Q_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the PLL1 Q output clock when enabled.

sink.name: PLL1R_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the PLL1 R output clock when enabled.

sink.name: PLL2P_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the PLL2 P output clock when enabled.

sink.name: PLL2Q_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the PLL2 Q output clock when enabled.

sink.name: PLL2R_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the PLL2 R output clock when enabled.

sink.name: PLL3P_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the PLL3 P output clock when enabled.

sink.name: PLL3Q_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the PLL3 Q output clock when enabled.

sink.name: PLL3R_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the PLL3 R output clock when enabled.

sink.name: USART1_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the USART1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: USART1_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the USART1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: USART2_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the USART2 clock when enabled.

sink.name: USART2_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the USART2 clock when enabled.

sink.name: USART3_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the USART3 clock when enabled.

sink.name: USART3_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the USART3 clock when enabled.

sink.name: UART4_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the UART4 clock when enabled.

sink.name: UART4_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the UART4 clock when enabled.

sink.name: UART5_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the UART5 clock when enabled.

sink.name: UART5_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the UART5 clock when enabled.

sink.name: LPUART1_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the LPUART1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: LPUART1_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the LPUART1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: I2C1_DRIVER
sink.description: I2C driver demands the I2C1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: I2C2_DRIVER
sink.description: I2C driver demands the I2C2 clock when enabled.

sink.name: I2C3_DRIVER
sink.description: I2C driver demands the I2C3 clock when enabled.

sink.name: I2C4_DRIVER
sink.description: I2C driver demands the I2C4 clock when enabled.

sink.name: SPI1_DRIVER
sink.description: SPI driver demands the SPI1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: SPI2_DRIVER
sink.description: SPI driver demands the SPI2 clock when enabled.

sink.name: SPI3_DRIVER
sink.description: SPI driver demands the SPI3 clock when enabled.

sink.name: FDCAN1_DRIVER
sink.description: CAN driver demands the FDCAN1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: SYSTICK_DRIVER
sink.description: System timer driver demands the SysTick clock when periodic mode is selected.

sink.name: TIMICSEL_HSI16_SOURCE
sink.description: TIMICSEL conservatively demands HSI16 when internal capture clocks are enabled.

sink.name: TIMICSEL_MSIS_SOURCE
sink.description: TIMICSEL conservatively demands MSIS when internal capture clocks are enabled.

sink.name: TIMICSEL_MSIK_SOURCE
sink.description: TIMICSEL conservatively demands MSIK when internal capture clocks are enabled.

sink.name: USB1_DRIVER
sink.description: USB driver demands the USB clock when enabled.

sink.name: SDMMC1_DRIVER
sink.description: SDC driver demands the SDMMC1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: SDMMC2_DRIVER
sink.description: SDC driver demands the SDMMC2 clock when enabled.

sink.name: OCTOSPI1_WSPI_DRIVER
sink.description: WSPI driver demands the OCTOSPI clock when OCTOSPI1 is enabled.

sink.name: OCTOSPI2_WSPI_DRIVER
sink.description: WSPI driver demands the OCTOSPI clock when OCTOSPI2 is enabled.

sink.name: RNG_DRIVER
sink.description: TRNG driver demands the RNG clock when enabled.

sink.name: SAI1_I2S_DRIVER
sink.description: I2S driver demands the SAI1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: SAI2_I2S_DRIVER
sink.description: I2S driver demands the SAI2 clock when enabled.

sink.name: MDF1_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the MDF1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: ADF1_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the ADF1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: ADCDAC_ADC_DRIVER
sink.description: ADC driver demands the ADCDAC clock when enabled.

sink.name: ADCDAC_DAC_DRIVER
sink.description: DAC driver demands the ADCDAC clock when enabled.

sink.name: DAC1SH_REQUIRED
sink.description: DAC sample-and-hold logic demands the DAC1SH clock when enabled.

sink.name: LPTIM1_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the LPTIM1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: LPTIM2_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the LPTIM2 clock when enabled.

sink.name: LPTIM34_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the LPTIM3 and LPTIM4 clocks when enabled.

sink.name: IWDG_DRIVER
sink.description: WDG driver demands the IWDG clock when enabled.
